mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stock_history ( stock_seq, store_seq, batch_seq, transaction_type, change_quantity, current_total_stock, detail_stock_name, price, expiration_date, reason, memo, created_at ) VALUES ( #{stockSeq}, #{storeSeq}, #{batchSeq}, #{transactionType}, #{changeQuantity}, #{currentTotalStock}, #{detailStockName}, #{price}, #{expirationDate}, #{reason}, #{memo}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT history_seq AS historySeq, stock_seq AS stockSeq, store_seq AS storeSeq, batch_seq AS batchSeq, transaction_type AS transactionType, change_quantity AS changeQuantity, current_total_stock AS currentTotalStock, detail_stock_name AS detailStockName, price, expiration_date AS expirationDate, reason, memo, created_at AS createdAt FROM stock_history WHERE store_seq = ( CASE WHEN #{storeSeq} IS NOT NULL AND #{storeSeq} != 0 THEN #{storeSeq} ELSE (SELECT store_seq FROM stores WHERE user_seq = #{userSeq} ORDER BY store_seq ASC LIMIT 1) END ) ORDER BY history_seq DESC LIMIT 5
